cases.name: actorless
cases.description: Declaration-only Contract; the identity payload and wire JSON omit the actor property entirely.

cases.name: empty_actor
cases.description: An explicitly empty service actor stays distinct from an actorless Contract.

cases.name: class
cases.description: Class actor root with init arguments; class nodes are valid only as the actor root.

cases.name: basic
cases.description: Service actor with one update method and a named record declaration.

cases.name: recursive
cases.description: Directly recursive record through an opt edge.

cases.name: mutual_recursion
cases.description: Two records referencing each other through opt edges; the cycle crosses node boundaries.

cases.name: hash_collision
cases.description: Two distinct method names sharing one Candid idl_hash u32 (name bytes break the tie), plus a third method whose alphabetical and id orders diverge, pinning id as the primary method sort key; duplicate funcs merge.

cases.name: unicode
cases.description: UTF-8/scalar declaration ordering (supplementary plane after U+FF61, unlike UTF-16), canonically equivalent non-normalized spellings kept distinct, and JSON string escaping.

cases.name: duplicate_semantic_nodes
cases.description: Bisimilar duplicate nodes collapse to one canonical node; several distinct raw arenas converge.

cases.name: arena_permutation
cases.description: One graph exercising every non-class node kind under three arena permutations with scrambled collection listings.

cases.name: declaration_root_order
cases.description: Actor-unreachable declaration targets whose quotient class-ID traversal order is the reverse of declaration-name order, and whose interface payload is a strict prefix of the canonical arena.
